hero.title: Thailand-Japan Game Programming Hackathon 2026
hero.subtitle: Unite Thai and Japanese developers. Create. Compete. Connect.

about.title: About the Event
about.description: A groundbreaking collaboration uniting young developers from Thailand and Japan. This hackathon is designed to foster innovation, cultural exchange, and excellence in game programming.
about.mission_text: To create a vibrant community where talented young developers can showcase their skills, collaborate across borders, and push the boundaries of game development.

stage1.title: Stage 1: Thailand Domestic Qualifier
stage1.description: Online and on-site competition across Thailand. Top teams advance to the Grand Final.

stage2.title: Stage 2: Grand Final
stage2.description: Thailand VS Japan - The ultimate showdown featuring the best teams from both nations.

prizes.title: Prizes & Mentors
prizes.subtitle: Amazing Rewards Await Winners
prizes.mentors_text: Learn from world-class developers and game industry professionals
